raw_consumer_statement:
on XX/XX/XXXX i filed for a chargeback to my citibank credit card, for {$1300.00} from XXXX XXXX. the original charge i from XX/XX/2023. 
this purchased was made in XXXX for a sofa replacement fabric that had 6 months delivery time. in XXXX after no replys from the merchant, i investigated and found out that the company filed for bankruptcy and is no longer in business. 

Despite this being a clear case of an allowable Chargeback, Citibank has continued to use delay tactics. first by taking 45 days to respond, than requested that i send the information by physical email only ( i was in XXXX, and had to use XXXX at my expense ). than by answering that they will not honer the chargeback. After another formal complaint they reached out to me to once again provide information on the transaction, despite already provided twice. 
i have sent the information a third time, and now i am already another 30 days with no response. 
So i got tired of waiting and delay tactis.
